nodes.label: AI as task decomposition tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or hallucinatory assistant
nodes.grounding_span: put the brief into a bot and ask it to break it down into component tasks, or for suggestions on how to approach it

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner vs delegator
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous task completer
nodes.grounding_span: more collaboration - i cant really think of complete tasks it could handle on its own

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: i am also wary about using it for text i'll be sharing, for fear of it sounding like AI/not like me

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: frustrated when i ask it how to do something in sheets, and it hallucinates a solution

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: just helping me do my job better and quicker. i guess theres a longer term issue of how long before it could do all my tasks

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace AI culture: job erosion and quality decline
nodes.grounding_span: our CEO is very keen... but there is also a negative side with our in-house AI software being used to rewrite articles, and a fear in the newsrooms that this is costing jobs

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: just helping me do my job better and quicker

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and unique voice
nodes.grounding_span: for fear of it sounding like AI/not like me

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: frustrated when i ask it how to do something in sheets, and it hallucinates a solution

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: maybe theres no point getting good at sheets and slides, and i need to focus on bigger picture strategy/leadership learning

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for document analysis
nodes.grounding_span: satisfied when i saw how well it could put together a full google doc and collaborate on edits

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: frustrated when i ask it how to do something in sheets, and it hallucinates a solution

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: i dont realy have any qualms using it for my role... i guess theres a longer term issue of how long before it could do all my tasks

nodes.label: Concern about improper AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: i sometimes read stuff from others and think, that sounds like AI, and judge them a bit... but then i do it myself

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: might try rephrasing once or twice, like saying 'i dont have that option'. will probably keep trying if its something i really need

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: i dont realy have any qualms using it for my role - not hurting anybody, just helping me do my job better and quicker
